description: Confidence scoring rules for obligation extractions. Base score plus additive factors.

factors.name: shall_trigger
factors.description: Clause contains the word 'shall' — strong mandatory indicator.

factors.name: strong_trigger
factors.description: Clause contains 'shall ensure', 'shall submit', 'shall report', or 'shall maintain'.
factors.condition: trigger_word in ['shall ensure', 'shall submit', 'shall report', 'shall maintain']

factors.name: exact_deadline
factors.description: Deadline includes an exact numeric duration or absolute date.
factors.condition: deadline.duration is not null or deadline.absolute_date is not null

factors.name: actor_identified
factors.description: A specific actor was matched (not just default 'Regulated Entity').

factors.name: cross_reference_present
factors.description: At least one cross-reference to another circular or act was found.

factors.name: domain_high_confidence_keyword
factors.description: Multiple domain keywords matched, not just one.

factors.name: long_clause
factors.description: Clause is long enough to contain full obligation context (>80 chars).

factors.name: llm_confirmed
factors.description: LLM extracted the same obligation as the regex engine (merged match).

factors.name: evidence_items_found
factors.description: Multiple evidence items mapped for this obligation.

factors.name: missing_actor_penalty
factors.description: No actor detected in the clause.

factors.name: vague_action_penalty
factors.description: Action text is very short or vague.

factors.name: may_trigger_penalty
factors.description: Only trigger is 'may' — discretionary, lower confidence.

factors.name: conflicting_signals
factors.description: Both mandatory and discretionary triggers found in the same clause.

factors.name: duplicate_penalty
factors.description: Obligation is a near-duplicate of another in the same section.

factors.name: hallucination_risk
factors.description: Actor does not appear in the source clause text.

factors.name: conditional_clause
factors.description: Obligation is conditional — actual applicability depends on trigger condition.

factors.name: penalty_mentioned
factors.description: Penalty clause found — strong signal this obligation is real.

factors.name: fine_amount_found
factors.description: A specific fine amount in INR was extracted.
